message:
chore(deps): Update Rust dependencies to latest stable versions

Updates Cargo.lock with latest compatible dependency versions.
This is a routine maintenance update performed via the library-updater workflow.

Changes documented in UPGRADE_LOG.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1196,18 +1196,18 @@ dependencies = [

+checksum = "4288b5bcbc7920c07a1149a35cf9590a2aa808e0bc1eafaade0b80947865fbc4"
 dependencies = [
  "thiserror-impl",

 [[package]]

-version = "2.0.17"

 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "3ff15c8ecd7de3849db632e14d18d2571fa09dfc5ed93479bc4485c7a517c913"
+checksum = "ebc4ee7f67670e9b64d05fa4253e753e016c6c95ff35b89b7941d6b856dec1d5"

  "proc-macro2",
  "quote",
